firstaid.gui.head: Head
firstaid.gui.apply_hint: 选择治疗部位后，还需按住右键完成施用
firstaid.gui.no_sleep_heal: Sleeping does not restore any health
firstaid.tooltip.morphine: Activates after %s, suppresses health debuffs for %s
firstaid.tooltip.adrenaline_injector: Injects after %s, grants haste, strength, and speed, suppresses pain for %s and grants heavy absorption
firstaid.tooltip.healer: Restores %s hearts total, requires %s per half heart
firstaid.tutorial.welcome: Welcome to the FirstAid mod! This tutorial will guide you through this mod and explain the different mechanics.
firstaid.tutorial.line1: As you may already have noticed, the vanilla health bar is gone. It has been replaced by this system.
firstaid.tutorial.line2: Every part of your body has it's own health. So if you fall from a high place...
firstaid.tutorial.line3: One of your feet will be damaged! This may cause some debuffs to apply, like slowness for damaged feet, mining fatigue for damaged arms and so on.
firstaid.tutorial.line4: These effects may be bypassed by taking morphine or healing the wound.
firstaid.tutorial.line5: Wounds can be healed by applying bandages or plaster (right click the item).
firstaid.tutorial.sleephint: If you sleep in a bed, your body will automatically regenerate a little bit.
firstaid.tutorial.line6: A player can die, if a critical organ's health (head or body) drop to zero.
firstaid.tutorial.line7: In this case, the player would be dead, no matter how much health the other organs have.
firstaid.tutorial.line8: If you want to see your current health and active healers, just press %s to open this interface with your health.
firstaid.tutorial.end: That is the end of the tutorial.
firstaid.config.damagesystem.tooltip: Settings regarding the max health of the body's parts. 2 = 1 heart
firstaid.config.overlay.tooltip: Settings regarding the health overlay when ingame
firstaid.config.internalhealing.tooltip: Settings regarding the internal healing system
firstaid.config.externalhealing.tooltip: Settings regarding external healing system(like vanilla potions or natural regeneration)
firstaid.config.debuffs.tooltip: Enable/Disable specify debuffs on specific body parts
firstaid.config.enablesoundsystem.toolti: Set to true to enable the debuff sounds. Requieres enableDebuffs to be true
firstaid.config.scalemaxhealth.tooltip: If true, max health is scaled to your hearts, and the config entries get multiplier to match the max health
firstaid.config.capmaxhealth.tooltip: If true, max health will be capped at 6 hearts and absorption at 2 hearts per limb. If false, the health cap will be much higher (64 hearts normal and 16 absorption)
firstaid.config.experimental.tooltip: If true, all usages of setHealth from other mods will be captured. Should not cause any problems, but allow mods like scaling health bandages to apply. Server side only
firstaid.config.totalheals.tooltip: The total heals this item does when applied. 1 heal = half a heart
firstaid.config.secondsperheal.tooltip: The time it takes for a single heal to trigger. Total time this item is active = this * totalHeals
firstaid.config.applytime.tooltip: The time it takes in the GUI to apply the item in milliseconds
firstaid.config.allownaturalregeneration: Allow vanilla's natural regeneration. Requires "allowOtherHealingItems" to be true\n**WARNING** This sets the gamerule "naturalRegeneration" for all of your worlds internally, so it persists even if you remove the mod
firstaid.config.allowotherhealingitems.t: If false, healing potions and other healing items will have no effect
firstaid.config.sleephealpercentage.tool: Specifies how much percent of the max health should be restored when sleeping
firstaid.config.otherregenmultiplier.too: The value external regen will be multiplied with. Has no effect if "Allow other healing items" is disabled
firstaid.config.naturalregenmultiplier.t: The value vanilla's natural regeneration will be multiplied with. Has no effect if "Allow natural items" is disabled
firstaid.config.showvanillahealthbar.too: True if the main health bar should be rendered (Will be average health)
firstaid.config.hideonnochange.tooltip: If true the overlay will automatically be hidden while health isn't changing. It will be shown when connecting and any health changes
firstaid.config.position.tooltip: The relative point of the overlay. 0=top+left, 1=top+right, 2=bottom+left, 3=bottom+right
firstaid.config.alpha.tooltip: Determines the transparency of the overlay. 200 = Maximum transparency, 0 = Fully opaque
firstaid.config.xoffset.tooltip: The offset on the x axis
firstaid.config.yoffset.tooltip: The offset on the y axis
firstaid.gui.unconscious_hint: You are unconscious and cannot open the health UI.
firstaid.gui.waiting_for_rescue: Waiting for rescue or execution by another player...
firstaid.gui.rescue_help: A nearby player can rescue you with a bandage or plaster for 8 seconds, revive you with a defibrillator in 3 seconds at the cost of 1 durability, or execute you with a weapon or tool for 5 seconds.
firstaid.gui.give_up_hint: Hold %s for 3 seconds to give up
firstaid.gui.rescue_prompt_item: Hold a bandage, plaster, or defibrillator to begin rescue.
firstaid.gui.rescue_execute_prompt_item: Hold a bandage, plaster, or defibrillator to %1$s, or a weapon or tool to %2$s.
firstaid.gui.rescue_prompt_crouch: Sneak beside the target for %s seconds.
firstaid.gui.execute_prompt_crouch: Sneak beside the target for %s seconds to execute.
firstaid.gui.healing_prompt_detail: 按住%1$s对%2$s持续施用 %3$s 秒。
firstaid.gui.healing_actionbar: 按住右键使用该物品：剩余 %s 秒
firstaid.gui.medicine_actionbar: 按住右键使用 %1$s：剩余 %2$s 秒
firstaid.gui.healing_selection_cleared: 已清除待施用部位，请重新选择
firstaid.command.revivewakeup.on: Rescued players now wake up after a delay
firstaid.command.revivewakeup.off: Rescued players now stand up immediately
firstaid.command.revivewakeup.time: Rescue wake-up delay enabled and set to %s seconds
firstaid.command.injurydebuff.effect.nor: Injury debuff for %s set to normal
firstaid.command.injurydebuff.effect.low: Injury debuff for %s set to low
firstaid.tip.commands.pain: /firstaid pain dynamic|mild - switch pain intensity mode
firstaid.tip.commands.suppression: /firstaid suppression dynamic|mild - switch suppression intensity mode
firstaid.tip.commands.medicineeffect: /firstaid medicineeffect realistic|assisted|casual - set medicine activation timing
firstaid.tip.commands.injurydebuff: /firstaid injurydebuff ... - adjust injury debuffs globally or per effect
firstaid.tip.commands.naturalregen: /firstaid naturalregen off|limited|full [critical|random] - 配置自然回血
firstaid.tip.commands.revivewakeup: /firstaid revivewakeup on [seconds]|off - configure wake-up delay after rescue
firstaid.tip.commands.damagepart: /damagePart ... - debug command for applying locational damage
firstaid.tip.commands.subheader: 点击方括号命令可预填充聊天栏，悬停可查看参数与示例。
firstaid.tip.commands.pain.label: 疼痛
firstaid.tip.commands.pain.detail:
切换疼痛强度模式
Dynamic：随伤势动态变化
Mild：总是保持较轻
点击填入：/firstaid pain dynamic
firstaid.tip.commands.suppression.label: 压制
firstaid.tip.commands.suppression.detail:
切换压制效果强度
Dynamic：随战斗压力变化
Mild：保持较轻的压制效果
点击填入：/firstaid suppression dynamic
firstaid.tip.commands.naturalregen.label: 自然回血
firstaid.tip.commands.naturalregen.detai:
设置自然回血
full：可回复到绿色
limited：只能回复到黄色
off：关闭
critical：头/躯干黄色及以下时优先
random：随机恢复可治疗部位
点击填入：/firstaid naturalregen limited critical
firstaid.tip.commands.medicineeffect.det:
设置药品生效时间
realistic：更慢更苛刻
assisted：均衡默认
casual：最快缓解
点击填入：/firstaid medicineeffect assisted
firstaid.tip.commands.revivewakeup.label: 醒来
firstaid.tip.commands.revivewakeup.detai:
选择被救后是否立即起身
on 15：15 秒后醒来
off：立即起身
点击填入：/firstaid revivewakeup on 15
firstaid.tip.commands.injurydebuff.label: 减益
firstaid.tip.commands.injurydebuff.detai:
全局或按效果单独调整伤势减益
全局示例：/firstaid injurydebuff normal
单效果示例：/firstaid injurydebuff minecraft:slowness off
firstaid.tip.commands.damagepart.label: 伤害测试
firstaid.tip.commands.damagepart.detail:
调试用部位伤害/治疗命令
示例：/damagePart HEAD 4
无减益：/damagePart HEAD 4 nodebuff
